creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 203990
shar(1) archive of CoyIM Ports script

CoyIM is a chat client that is safe and secure by default: no settings to change, no plugins to install, no computer configuration to change.

---

QA:
- portlint -AC
- poudriere - 11.2 / 12.0 / 13-CURRENT (both i386/amd64 for all)
- Manually tested on - 12.0-RELEASE-p3

---

It would be nice if this port can be a new addition to the net-im category. I am happy to answer any questions on the port or if any modifications needs to be done to the submitted ports script.
